text:
Once there was a young shepherd girl named Heidi with sky-blue eyes as big as saucers. Every day she would walk along the snowy mountainside towards the old cherry orchard her grandfather tended.

Every evening she would look back at the mountain village she didn't have. One day she noticed a peculiar snowball rolling down the hill. She picked it up to see a little fairy fluttering out. The fairy giggled and told Heidi that she would grant her three wishes… but only after spending a day learning three ancient healing practices from a magical bird.

Heidi was thrilled to learn the bird could only grant her wishes on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays. 

For her first wish, Heidi wished for enough apples to feed her flock until their old oak tree fruited again. The creature obliged and soon there were dozens of apples for Heidi's entire flock to enjoy.

For her second wish, Heidi wanted to cure her grandmother's arthritic knee. Instantly, it healed to
